perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a man wearing a bright yellow hoodie, a black-and-white houndstooth patterned flat cap, and a navy blue backpack walking towards the entrance of the San Jose McEnery Convention Center. (2) He transitions to the interior of the convention center, walking and talking enthusiastically toward the camera while surrounded by other attendees. (3) He is seen running down a brightly lit hallway with green and white GTC-themed banners in the background. (4) He enters the NVIDIA 'Gear Store', browsing various merchandise including black hats, green socks, and black mugs with logos. (5) He interacts with another male who shows him a black T-shirt with a circuit board design and an RTX GPU graphic design.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy electronic pop music with a fast tempo starts immediately. (2) A male voice speaks enthusiastically in Mandarin, expressing excitement about reaching the souvenir shop and his mission to buy a T-shirt. (3) Transition sound effects (SFX) such as a 'boing' sound accompany his jumping movement. (4) The audio records ambient chatter and the man's interaction with a store assistant, discussing specific merchandise designs. (5) The music continues to bridge the scenes, maintaining a lively atmosphere until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'NVIDIA 周邊買什麼?' (What to buy at NVIDIA merchandise shop?) in green bars. (2) Decorative Text: Social media handles '@3ctim' in the top left corner. (3) Functional Text: Chronological subtitles in Traditional Chinese translating the creator's narration about his 15-minute time limit. (4) Decorative Text: '快樂小跳躍' (Happy little jump) appears with animated icons during a jump cut. (5) Functional Text: Price tags like '$25' are visible on the store shelves. (6) Decorative Text: A large white '壞!' (Naughty!) sticker appears over the creator's face at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Exterior -> Walkthrough -> Gear Store Shopping -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 male shop assistant showing clothes, and at least 10 other attendees in the convention background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male with glasses, a bright yellow hoodie, a distinctive houndstooth flat cap, and a blue backpack.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video moves from a sunny exterior plaza of a convention center to a modern, brightly lit interior with 'GTC' branding and a retail space filled with shelves of black and green merchandise.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural daylight followed by bright, cool-toned indoor facility lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Action -> Detailed Exploration -> Humorous Close
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle and tech-culture vlog intended to show viewers the merchandise available at the NVIDIA GTC conference. It uses high-energy editing and a personal POV to make the audience feel like they are exploring the event with the creator.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: General event coverage by a tech influencer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: 3cTim signature intro and animated Traditional Chinese captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical of high-engagement social media shorts, utilizing bright colors, fast cuts, and relatable 'fanboy' energy regarding tech brands.
